title: add support for completions
body:
This PR adds the first level skopeo commands as bash auto completions.

Partially addresses issue #4 

This is to test the waters for the simple bash completions. Can add bash completion functions for skopeo command parameters and zsh completions (if folks want those too) in subsequent PR(s). 

Signed-off-by: Mike Brown brownwm@us.ibm.com

comments.body:
ping @rhatdan since I'm using zsh :smile: 

@mikebrow seems like it's not rebased though
odd.. the updated file show's the rebased changes.. will try again

Here is what I see.

```
# skopeo <tab>
copy               h                  inspect            standalone-sign
delete             help               layers             standalone-verify
```

The h and help seem wrong.  No command completion for options.

Seems to be the way this works.  I would like to see all of the completions, but this is a start.
LGTM

@runcom I ran the following three commands to manually add/test on zsh:

```
$ zsh
mike-VirtualBox% autoload -U +X compinit && compinit
mike-VirtualBox% autoload -U +X bashcompinit && bashcompinit
mike-VirtualBox% BASH_SOURCE="/usr/share/bash-completion/completions/skopeo" source /usr/share/bash-completion/completions/skopeo 
```

Works fine... 

```
mike-VirtualBox% skopeo     
copy               h                  inspect            standalone-sign   
delete             help               layers             standalone-verify
```

now to get that to our makefile install target and start learning zsh :-)
